channel.title: admin on Academic
channel.description: Recent content in admin on Academic

item.title: Display Jupyter Notebooks with Academic
item.description: Learn how to blog in Academic using Jupyter notebooks

item.title: Academic: the website builder for Hugo
item.description: Create a beautifully simple website in under 10 minutes.

item.title: Dandelot - Reading Music as a Game
item.description: Dandelot is a computer game that trains your skills for reading music in the treble, bass, and alto clefs.

item.title: Musical Tic-Tac-Toe
item.description: A music-based game mechanic based where players compete to complete cadences
I am interested in all of the ways in which modern technologies can help us to learn, understand, create, and enjoy music.
